sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32329" key="e)kleio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκλειόω</orth>, <sense id="n32329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rub down</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to pieces,</tr_> Alcx.Trail.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:156D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.156D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
